title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BEL Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BEL Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
BEL Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
